name: Linda's Lemon Prairie Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease and flour a 10-inch fluted pan.
2. Cream together the butter, sugar, eggs until well creamed.
3. Add eggs one at a time.
4. Add flour one cup at a time and mix well.
5. Add carbonated beverage and lemon extract and mix.
6. Pour into a 10-inch fluted pan and bake at 350°F for 60-65 minutes.
